calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation
Robert Kain, Esq. on behalf of Brenda Bowman

The parties reached a settlement. Terms of the settlement is as follows: Defendant Brenda Bowman will vacate premises located at 44 McAllister St., Unit 307 by 11:59 p.m. on Feb. 28, 2005. Failure to comply with the terms will result in judgment being filed, and immediate restitution of premises. Stipulation for entry of judgment was signed but not filed.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Hakewill Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce, #3321 (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
